---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# Patrick Lefler

### Cybersecurity Manager | Risk Analysis | Data Visualization

Bridging cybersecurity expertise with advanced statistical modeling and data visualization
:::

## Featured Projects

::: {.project-grid}

::: {.project-card}
### Cybersecurity & Threat Analysis
**Security Incident Monitor Dashboard**  
Interactive R Shiny dashboard for real-time security incident monitoring and threat intelligence aggregation.  
[View Project →](https://patrick-lefler.github.io/security-incident-monitor/)

**Network Scanning Analysis**  
Comprehensive nmap scanning analysis with R-based visualization and statistical modeling.  
[View Project →](https://patrick-lefler.github.io/nmap-analysis/)

**Threat Modeling with STRIDE**  
Implementation framework for systematic threat identification in financial applications.  
[View Project →](https://patrick-lefler.github.io/stride-framework/)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Risk Management & Financial Analysis
**Credit Risk Scorecard**  
Machine learning workflow for credit default prediction with feature engineering and model validation.  
[View Project →](https://patrick-lefler.github.io/credit-risk-scorecard/)

**Tail Risk Hedging Analysis**  
Clayton Copula modeling for portfolio tail risk assessment and hedging strategies.  
[View Project →](https://patrick-lefler.github.io/tail-risk-hedging/)

**Monte Carlo Project Simulations**  
Timeline and budget risk analysis using lognormal distributions for project management.  
[View Project →](https://patrick-lefler.github.io/project-simulation/)
:::

::: {.project-card}
### Data Visualization & Statistical Modeling
**State Financial Health Assessment**  
Interactive hexagon tile maps visualizing fiscal metrics across US states.  
[View Project →](https://patrick-lefler.github.io/state-financial-health/)

**Options Implied Volatility Calculator**  
Interactive tool for options pricing and Greeks calculation with real-time visualization.  
[View Project →](https://patrick-lefler.github.io/options-calculator/)

**Blockchain Data Visualization**  
Network analysis and visualization of Bitcoin transaction patterns and network health metrics.  
[View Project →](https://patrick-lefler.github.io/blockchain-visualization/)
:::

:::

## Technical Writing

Recent articles on cybersecurity and risk management:

- **Shift-Left Security Economics**: Cost-benefit analysis of early-stage security integration
- **Insider Threat Detection with Markov Models**: Statistical approaches to behavioral anomaly detection
- **Bitcoin Halving Mechanisms**: Analysis of monetary policy and network effects

[View all articles on Medium →](https://medium.com/@patrick-lefler)

---

::: {.contact-section}
## Let's Connect

I create technical content on cybersecurity, risk management, and data visualization.

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/patrick-lefler) | [GitHub](https://github.com/patrick-lefler) | [Medium](https://medium.com/@patrick-lefler)
:::
